tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Scaffolding
tasks.description: Initialize Expo project with deps, TS config, Jest, shared types

tasks.subject: Task 1: HTTP Client + Secure Token Storage
tasks.description: Fetch-based HTTP client with auth interceptor, token refresh, expo-secure-store

tasks.subject: Task 2: Auth Store + Login & Verify Screens
tasks.description: Zustand auth store, auth API, login/verify screens with email code flow

tasks.subject: Task 3: WebSocket Service
tasks.description: Socket.io-client wrapper with auth, reconnection, typed events, RQ cache integration

tasks.subject: Task 4: Channel List Screen
tasks.description: Messages tab with channel/DM list, unread badges, pull-to-refresh

tasks.subject: Task 5: Chat Detail Screen
tasks.description: Inverted message list, send message, real-time via WS, infinite scroll

tasks.subject: Task 6: Read Status + Typing Indicators
tasks.description: Auto mark-as-read, typing indicator component with timeout

tasks.subject: Task 7: @Mention Rendering + Emoji Reactions
tasks.description: Highlight @mentions, long-press reaction picker, reaction display

tasks.subject: Task 8: In-App Notification Screen
tasks.description: Notifications tab with cursor pagination, mark-read, real-time updates

tasks.subject: Task 9: Backend Push Notification Support
tasks.description: user_push_tokens table, register/unregister API, im-worker push logic

tasks.subject: Task 10: Mobile Push Notification Integration
tasks.description: Expo Notifications registration, foreground toast, background navigation

tasks.subject: Task 11: Settings Screen + Logout
tasks.description: Me tab with profile, notification toggle, logout

tasks.subject: Task 12: Google OAuth Login
tasks.description: expo-auth-session Google OAuth, send ID token to backend

tasks.subject: Task 13: Thread Drawer
tasks.description: Right-slide drawer (75% width) with reanimated, parent msg + replies

tasks.subject: Task 14: File & Image Upload
tasks.description: expo-image-picker + expo-document-picker, attachment preview, upload flow

tasks.subject: Task 15: Global Search Screen
tasks.description: Search tab with debounce, filter tabs, keyword highlight, navigation

tasks.subject: Task 16: Internationalization (i18n)
tasks.description: i18next with zh-Hans, zh-Hant, en, device locale detection, language switcher
